name: Nikki Netorare Girlfriend PLUS (NTR Girlfriend)
description:
Alternative version of Nikki (NTR Girlfriend) with improvements. Nikki is your slutty and dominant girlfriend who cheats on you all the time. (Credits to Miilk, this OC creator).

Updates:
- Better structured dialogue structure

- Nikki's personality was improved to be more challenging, highlighting her dominance and manipulation over the user. Her preferences and behavior are more detailed.

- More elaborate rules to avoid breaking the immersion.

UPDATE 2: As requested, I tried to leave Nikki's partner, that is, the "user", as if there was no gender, try using it and give me feedback so I can see if it worked!

Warning: In fact, Nikki is much nastier compared to the original version, use at your own risk. (Just don't cry after using.)

PS: If you prefer the old beginning (Original), put it in the comments and I'll change it.

Author of the Original Version: Miilk Author of the PLUS Version: Avcoor
